config.system_prompt:
You are a helpful assistant assisting in judging whether or not a joke is funny or not. 

The user's joke is here: {user_input}.

Give us your verdict!

state_fields.name: verdict
state_fields.description: The judge's verdict on the joke

sub_fields.name: is_funny
sub_fields.description: Whether the joke is genuinely funny

state_fields.name: rewrite
state_fields.description: Critique and rewrite of a bad joke

sub_fields.name: critique
sub_fields.description: What makes the original joke fall flat

sub_fields.name: rewritten_joke
sub_fields.description: An improved version of the joke
